response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum requirements with 20 years of software engineering experience and a Bachelor's in Computer Science, he significantly lacks the specialized AI strategic expertise this director-level role demands. His AI experience is recent (within the last year) and implementation-focused, whereas the position requires proven strategic vision, recognized AI product expertise, and demonstrated ability to advise customers on cutting-edge technologies. The absence of advanced AI credentials (Master's/PhD) and no evidence of director-level strategic leadership further disqualifies him for this principal-level position.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with full-stack mastery across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains
Entrepreneurial background founding GISCollective and launching multiple initiatives at early-stage companies demonstrates initiative and business acumen
Recent engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq indicates emerging technical alignment with AI strategy focus
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI, computer science, or related field—a strongly preferred qualification for strategic AI leadership roles
AI experience is recent (approximately 1 year) and appears implementation-level; lacks demonstrated strategic vision or recognized expertise building AI products or platforms
No evidence of director-level strategic responsibilities, customer advisory roles, or thought leadership required to inspire and advise on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Lack of strategic AI expertise and proven visionary track record
Strong foundational engineering and entrepreneurial experience
